results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Recursive rubric decomposition + Anthropic 2026 panel-based LLM judges IS the multi-judge panel + rubric framework.
EXACT TWIN — AgentsCourt simulated legal-case tribunal with agent judges + fallacy injection IS the kris tribunal customary-court mechanism applied to LLM evaluation.
Calibration + IRT for noisy judges IS the chair-elected coordinator + judge reliability accountability paradigm.
Comprehensive survey covers panel + juries + rubrics + calibration — functional space saturation for tribunal-style LLM evaluation.
EXACT TWIN — CAI generate→critique→revise with constitutional principles IS the multi-stage trial procedure for candidate output.
EXACT TWIN — Locked rubrics + evidence-anchored scoring IS the evidence-anchored rubric assessment phase of KRIS-TRIBUNAL.
Multi-turn evaluation + pipeline regression + thresholds covers continuous tribunal-pipeline integration with blacklist/sanction enforcement.
C3AI framework for crafting + evaluating constitutions covers principled-evaluation constitution paradigm.
